videos.title: Can Our Partners Change?
videos.author: The School of Life
videos.description:
Emotional Intelligence, Daily. Start now: https://www.theschooloflife.com/subscription/ 

Why won't they change? This film explores the deep psychology of relationship patterns. Understand the limits of change and why some traits are wired for life. Find peace, not endless frustration. #Relationship

videos.title: How to Be More Straightforward
videos.author: The School of Life
videos.description:
We prefer people who are ‘straightforward’: who are direct and unambiguous about their desires and characters. Becoming more so involves untangling the self-deceptions we constructed when we were young.
